text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 125 

IP_LOW_VOL_PYMT_AMT 

LABEL: Inpatient Low Volume Payment Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount field used to identify a payment adjustment given to hospitals to account for the higher 
costs per discharge for low-income hospitals under the Inpatient Prospective Payment System (IPPS). 

SHORT NAME: IP_LOW_VOL_PYMT_AMT 

LONG NAME: IP_LOW_VOL_PYMT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR
